title: Sneak Actions
description: Perform a big jump or safe fall by using your sneak/crouch button!
body:
# Sneak Actions
This datapack allows you to perform more actions by using your sneak key. The following shows the actions, as well as how to do the actions:
- **Big Jump**
  - Jump within a fourth of a second after letting go of your sneak button to perform a 2-block jump. The big jump won't perform if you were sneaking for more than 1 second.
- **Safe Fall**
  - Sneak within a fourth of a second before landing to take no fall damage. This only works for falls 20 block or less.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/echhgfQNEds" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Config
This datapack is highly customizable, with multiple functions that allow you to disable or enable features. The following is a list of commands to toggle or use features:
- **/function sneakactions:config/info** (shows this list in-game)
- **/function sneakactions:config/safe_sneak_fall** (toggles safe fall by sneaking)
- **/function sneakactions:config/big_jump** (toggles big jump)
- **/function sneakactions:config/big_jump_particles** (toggles big jump particles)
- **/function sneakactions:config/big_jump_sound** (toggles big jump sound)
- **/function sneakactions:config/config_visibility** (toggles the visiblity of the config in the sidebar)

<details>
<summary>In-game Config Information</summary>

![In-game config information.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64ff7bd802cfea075dc8cff1c3b4312756c25253_0.webp)
_**config/config_visible** has been updated to **config/config_visibility**_

_**sneakjump** has been updated to **sneakactions**_

</details>
<details>
<summary>Uninstallation Guide</summary>
  
If you decide to remove the datapack from your world, follow this process:
1. Run the command "/function sneakactions:uninstall"
2. Delete the pack from your world's datapack folder (unless you want to re-enable the datapack later)

To re-enable the pack, **make sure you did not do step 2,** then run the command "/datapack enable "file/sneak_actions.zip"

</details>

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/sneak-actions/)
